$comment: Stage 1 (AC01..AC23) + Stage 2 (AC-S2-01..AC-S2-17) acceptance criteria → verification owner manifest. Each AC must have a non-empty owner. 'deferred-PR-2' / 'deferred-PR-3' / 'deferred-post-stage-2' are valid markers; the script accepts those as 'mapped'. The Stage 2 block was added during the Stage 2 closeout (spec §19 Rev A.3) to record where each Stage 2 AC is verified after PR #1–#6 merged.
